calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-03-2022 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-03-2022 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being assigned from Department 206 for commencement of short couse trial/prove-u hearing.

Dept. 514; Judge: Murlene J. Randle; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 02:05:40 p.m. and concluding at 02:14:54 p.m.

Plaintiff Capital One Bank represented by Brian Langedyk, Esq.
Defendant May W. Hau not appearing.

ERIKA POPE, Litigation Specialist is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff under direct examination.

The following exhibits are MARKED/ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE:

Plaintiff's Exhibit No. 1 - Billing Statements

Plaintiff rests.
The matter is submitted.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Capital One Bank, (USA), N.A., and against Defendant May W. Hau.

Plaintiff Capital One Bank, (USA), N.A., is awarded judgment against Defendant May W. Hau as follows:

Damages/Principal: $10,672.85
Costs: $497.00

Total Judgment: $11,169.85

Proposed Judgment was submitted, signed by the Court, and served in open court.
Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibits.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-28-2022 Set For Trial On Oct-03-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Admitted, Memorandum In Support; Declaration In Support
Off Calendar May-11-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.'s Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Admitted:

The Motion is granted: The truth of all specified facts in the Request for Admissions, Set One, propounded by plaintiff Capital One Bank (USA), N.A. on defendant MAY W HAU by mail on December 13, 2021, are deemed admitted.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the substantive portion of the Court's ruling via email to tom@thomascohen.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Tom Cohen, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Admitted, Memorandum In Support; Declaration In Support
Off Calendar Apr-25-2022 Continued To May-11-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
